news.headline: Aberdeen Group plc (QURE) discloses 2.85M-share, 4.52% holding in uniQure
JPMorgan Chase & Co. Discloses 7.0% Passive Stake in uniQure
news.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. filed a Schedule 13G disclosing beneficial ownership of approximately 4,866,211 uniQure ordinary shares, equal to roughly 7.0% of shares outstanding, held as a passive institutional investment. The filing adds to a run of large institutional-ownership disclosures following the stock's post-FDA-reversal rally.

news.headline: uniQure CEO sells 21,082 shares after option exercise under 10b5-1 plan
news.summary: CEO Matthew Kapusta exercised options at $19.39 and sold the resulting 21,082 ordinary shares at roughly $45-$46 under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Similar 10b5-1 exercises/sales were also reported for the CMO and a director around the same time (late June/early July).

news.headline: uniQure Announces Closing of Upsized Public Offering and Full Exercise by Underwriters of Option to Purchase Additional Shares
news.summary: uniQure closed its underwritten offering of 5,686,813 ordinary shares at $45.50 per share, upsized from an initially announced $150 million raise and including the underwriters' full option exercise, for gross proceeds of approximately $259 million. Proceeds are earmarked to fund the planned AMT-130 BLA submission and broader pipeline development.

news.headline: uniQure Announces Preliminary Data on the First Cohort in the Phase I/IIa Clinical Trial of AMT-260 in Refractory Mesial Temporal Lobe Epilepsy
news.summary: Six-month follow-up data on the first, low-dose AMT-260 cohort (six patients) showed the therapy was generally well tolerated with no serious adverse events, and three of six patients had meaningful reductions (79%-100%) in disabling seizures. Enrollment in the higher-dose cohort is ongoing, with updated data from both cohorts expected in H1 2027.

news.headline: Barclays, Cantor Fitzgerald, RBC, Goldman Sachs and others sharply raise uniQure price targets after FDA reversal
news.summary: Following the FDA's reversal on the AMT-130 filing pathway, Barclays upgraded QURE to Overweight with a $65 target, Cantor Fitzgerald upgraded to Overweight at $61, RBC Capital raised its target to $65, Goldman Sachs raised its target to $46 (Neutral), and H.C. Wainwright and Mizuho lifted targets to $80 and $68 respectively. The wave of upgrades followed the stock's roughly 78% single-day surge.

news.headline: uniQure Announces Plan for BLA Submission for AMT-130 in Huntington's Disease
news.summary: The FDA informed uniQure during a Type B meeting that the ~3-year Phase I/II data (75% slowing of cUHDRS progression vs. external control, p=0.003) can serve as the primary basis for a BLA seeking accelerated approval, reversing its earlier stance requiring a new randomized/sham-controlled trial. uniQure plans to submit the BLA in Q3 2026; shares surged about 78% on the news.

catalysts.label: AMT-130 BLA submission (US)
catalysts.detail: uniQure plans to submit a Biologics License Application to the FDA seeking accelerated approval of AMT-130 for Huntington's disease, based on ~3-year Phase I/II data accepted by the FDA as the primary efficacy basis.

catalysts.label: UK MHRA MAA filing for AMT-130
catalysts.detail: Following a successful pre-submission meeting, uniQure plans to file a Marketing Authorization Application with the UK MHRA for AMT-130 in Huntington's disease.

catalysts.label: 4-year AMT-130 data analysis
catalysts.detail: uniQure expects to complete a 4-year analysis of the Phase I/II AMT-130 data, following FDA feedback on the statistical analysis plan discussed at the Type B meeting.

catalysts.label: FDA alignment on confirmatory study design
catalysts.detail: Before the BLA submission, uniQure still needs to finalize the design of the required post-approval confirmatory study with the FDA, including whether it uses a concurrent standard-of-care control arm instead of a sham-surgery placebo; the FDA has said it will work expeditiously with the company on this.

catalysts.label: Q2 2026 earnings report
catalysts.detail: uniQure is expected to report second-quarter 2026 financial results and provide a pipeline/regulatory update; the window is an analyst/data-provider estimate based on prior-year timing, and as of July 20 the company has not yet issued a formal date-announcement press release.

catalysts.label: AMT-260 higher-dose cohort enrollment completion
catalysts.detail: Enrollment in the second, higher-dose (3x10^12 gc/mL) AMT-260 cohort of six refractory mesial temporal lobe epilepsy patients is expected to complete around mid-2026.

catalysts.label: AMT-260 updated data (both cohorts)
catalysts.detail: uniQure expects to present updated efficacy/safety results from both the low- and higher-dose AMT-260 cohorts in refractory mesial temporal lobe epilepsy.

catalysts.label: Potential FDA accelerated approval decision for AMT-130
catalysts.detail: If the BLA is submitted in Q3 2026 and granted priority review, a potential FDA approval decision could arrive around mid-2027; timing not yet company-confirmed.

catalysts.label: Additional international regulatory updates
catalysts.detail: uniQure is pursuing further regulatory pathways for AMT-130 in additional international markets beyond the US and UK, with updates expected in the second half of 2026.

pulse: uniQure shares surged roughly 70-80% in mid-June 2026 after the FDA reversed course and agreed that ~3-year Phase I/II data on AMT-130 can support an accelerated-approval BLA in Huntington's disease, triggering a wave of analyst upgrades (targets up to $80) and enabling a $259M capital raise to fund the filing. As of July 20 the stock has settled into a consolidation range in the low-to-mid $40s, with the only fresh developments since early July being routine insider 10b5-1 sales and a July 16 Schedule 13G showing JPMorgan Chase has built a 7.0% passive stake, evidence of growing institutional interest. Markets are now awaiting the confirmed Q3 2026 AMT-130 BLA and UK MHRA filings (both due imminently since Q3 began July 1), finalization of the FDA-mandated post-approval confirmatory study design, and an as-yet-unconfirmed Q2 2026 earnings update expected in late July or early August; sentiment remains bullish (Strong Buy consensus, average target near $65) but hinges on execution of the upcoming regulatory filings.
